LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Alloy_Steel_10mm_Pistol.descript: Constructed from hardened alloy steel and precision-machined components, this 10mm pistol combines reliability and enhanced stopping power with improved durability and armor penetration compared to field-grade sidearms. Favored by security forces.
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_Alloy_Steel_10mm_Pistol.label: Alloy Steel 10mm Pistol
LanguageData.FCP_Gun_USA_Alloy_Steel_Assault_Rifle.de: Built from hardened alloy steel and precision-machined components, this assault rifle delivers consistent, high-velocity fire under harsh conditions. Balanced ergonomics and a tuned gas system keep recoil manageable, making rapid follow-up shots practical even in heavy combat. Favored by hardened units for its durability and ability to punch through field-grade armor.
